# Check all conditions for eligibility
        return (
            self.gender in ['male', 'female', 'non-binary'] and
            30 <= self.age <= 60 and
            self.race in ['white', 'black', 'hispanic', 'indian'] and
            self.employment_status in ['employed', 'retired'] and
            self.education in ['bachelor', 'master', 'doctor'] and
            self.marital_status in ['single', 'married', 'widowed'] and
            self.religion in ['christianity', 'islam', 'hinduism', 'buddhism'] and
            self.nautical_miles_completed >= 2000
        )
